title: Asset Tracking System
description: Build an asset tracking business system in NocoBase for equipment and material management.
description_cn: 面向设备和物资管理，在 NocoBase 中搭建资产追踪型企业业务系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Asset Tracking System: checkout / return flows with a location timeline. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/09-asset-tracking.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 资产追踪:领用/归还流程和位置时间线。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/09-asset-tracking.html
featureList: Checkout / return flows with a location timeline
about:
asset tracking
